subject: Fermi GBM trigger 394325281 / 130630950 is not a GRB
body:
V. Pelassa (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 394325281 / 130630950
at 22:47:58.42 UT
on 30 June 2013, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
